headline: QUALIFY THE MAKER, NOT THE MIDDLEMAN
subheading: A UK QP's risk-based blueprint for excipient suppliers your MHRA inspector will accept.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial composition evoking pharmaceutical excipient supplier qualification and supply-chain scrutiny. A pristine clear glass laboratory vessel holds fine, snow-white powder catching a soft cyan rim of light, resting on a polished deep-navy surface. Behind it, an abstract glowing teal network of interconnected nodes and traceable links flows across the supply chain, threading between faint manufacturer-to-warehouse waypoints, with one node highlighted by a fresh-green verification glow as if approved. Subtle blurred sample jars and a faint geometric audit-checklist motif dissolve into the dark depth of field. A delicate magnifier-style lens flare suggests inspection and traceability without literal icons. Cool teal and cyan tones over rich deep navy, premium clinical atmosphere, calm and precise, soft volumetric side lighting, shallow depth of field with crisp focus on the powder and the glowing chain. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
